description: You are a Biomedical Engineering Technician configuring a monitoring setup in OpenICE. Create two identical simulated 'Pulse Oximeter' devices and confirm data flow in the 'Vital Signs' clinical application. Identify the unique UUID for each device and record them in a JSON mapping file at /home/ga/Desktop/device_map.json using the format: {"monitor_1_uuid": "<uuid>", "monitor_2_uuid": "<uuid>"}. Save a screenshot showing the source of these IDs to /home/ga/Desktop/id_evidence.png.
